topic:ionic_bond.title: Ionic Chemical Bond
topic:ionic_bond.summary: An ionic bond forms between a metal and a nonmetal through complete electron transfer. Electronegativity difference Δχ ≥ 1.7. Characteristic of salts, metal oxides, and hydroxides.

topic:covalent_polar.title: Polar Covalent Chemical Bond
topic:covalent_polar.summary: A polar covalent bond forms between different nonmetals via shared electron pairs. Electronegativity difference 0.4 < Δχ < 1.7. The electron pair is shifted toward the more electronegative atom.

topic:oxidation_rules.title: Rules for Determining Oxidation States
topic:oxidation_rules.summary: Oxidation state (OS) is the formal charge of an atom in a compound. Determined by rules: fluorine is always −1, oxygen is usually −2, hydrogen is usually +1. The sum of oxidation states in a neutral molecule equals 0.

topic:molar_mass.title: Molar Mass of a Substance
topic:molar_mass.summary: Molar mass (M) is the mass of one mole of a substance, g/mol. Numerically equal to the sum of atomic masses of all atoms in the formula. Related to amount of substance by n = m / M.
